ls NwV] vfrHkjkbZ;qDr okguksa ds fy, Qhl dh njsa] njksa esa NwV vkfn mDr fu;eksa vkSj vfrHkjkbZ;qDr okguksa ls lacaf/kr [k.M gsrq lk-dk-fu- 778¼v½] rkjh[k 16-12-2013 }kjk fd, x, la“kks/ku ds vuqlkj gksaxh A [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@622@11&12@lhvks@thlh lEcyiqj&mM+hlk@NRrhlx<+ lhek ¼0&88½ chvksVh] vyds“k “kekZ] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th September, 2014 S.O. 2440(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road, Transport and Highways number S.O. 2594(E), dated 17th November, 2011, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:- In the said notification, under the Notes the existing para 4:- 4. The fee shall be collected at the following location of Toll Plaza for the length specified: Shall be substituted as:- 4. The fee shall be collected at the following location of Toll Plaza for the length specified : In the said notification, existing para 5:- 5. Exemption from payment of fee, rates of fee for overloaded vehicles, discounts in rates etc. shall be in accordance with the said rules. Shall be substituted as:- 5. Exemption from payment of fee, rates of fee for overloaded vehicles, discounts in rates etc. shall be in accordance with the said rules and its amendment vide G.S.R.778(E) dated 16.12.2013 for the clause regarding overloaded vehicles. [F. No. NHAI/13013/622/11-12/CO/GC Sambalpur–Orissa/Chhatisgarh Border (0-88) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. Location of Toll Plaza Length (in km) for which Fee payable Km 42.00 of National Highway No.—6 For 80.90 Kms length of the section and for 7.30 Kms of Baragarh bypass, the estimated cost of which is rupees 74.00 Crores. Location of Toll Plaza Length (in km) for which Fee payable Km 41.00 of National Highway No.—6 For 80.90 Kms length of the section and for 7.30 Kms of Baragarh bypass, the estimated cost of which is rupees 74.00 Crores. -- 2 of 2 --
